ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "playerID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "teamID" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of Birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playerID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_teamID FOREIGN KEY ("teamID") REFERENCES teams ("teamID")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "teamID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Official name of the team */,
  "leagueID" TEXT /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teamID")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "leagueID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., National League, American League) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leagueID")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year for which the salary is applicable */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player associated with the salary */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount of the player for the specified year */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount for the player for the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yearID", "playerID")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player associated with the statistics */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Runs Batted In by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the player */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yearID", "playerID")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contractID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player associated with the contract */,
  "teamID" TEXT /* ID of the team that the contract is for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total monetary value of the contract */,
  "agentID" INTEGER /* ID of the agent representing the player */,
  "option_years" INTEGER /* Number of option years in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_playerID FOREIGN KEY ("playerID") REFERENCES players ("playerID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_teamID FOREIGN KEY ("teamID") REFERENCES teams ("teamID")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staffID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "teamID" TEXT /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., manager, coach) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of Birth of the staff member */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staffID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_teamID FOREIGN KEY ("teamID") REFERENCES teams ("teamID")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transactionID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "teamID_from" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is coming from */,
  "teamID_to" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is going to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction took place */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., trade, acquisition) */,
  "transaction_value" REAL /* Monetary value associated with the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transactionID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_teamID_from FOREIGN KEY ("teamID_from") REFERENCES teams ("teamID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_playerID FOREIGN KEY ("playerID") REFERENCES players ("playerID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_teamID_to FOREIGN KEY ("teamID_to") REFERENCES teams ("teamID")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "userID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role/permission level of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "teamID" TEXT /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("userID")
)
